definition: A critical conceptual unit within the top term domain of the Exegesis. Mentions: 129.
interpretive_note: Primary Source Evidence: "...carries with him a friends list. The messenger, Elijah, shapes up and squares up each person on the list; this involves making him pious, and directing him to engage in good works; he is good of attitude and good of action. Let's say there is a five to six month period in which the persons are reshaped and refined and reworked. They are born anew, in God, and it's a hard row to hoe. They are acqua..."

It’s odd that I recall the sizzling rope of poppies in the snow so clearly and not the rest. What I saw the other night, the swirls of vines up the vestment of my saint statue – that was like it: the bursting forth into life of Spring, in the midst of stark winter. Now, this is obviously a mescaline type of experience. We know that. And I was loaded. And yet, perhaps Ms. Fisher who wrote THE RED FEATHER based that episode on something she expe

Mrs. Phyllis Boucher 2643 Dana St. Berkeley, Calif.

Dear Phyllis,

I have long thought about you, wondering how you are, and my having just now written the short enclosed piece, which is about Tony, gives me pretext to write you as well as the opportunity to extend this copy of the piece so that you might read it. When I met Theodore Surgeon, who wrote MORE THAN HUMAN, this good man said to me right off, “What sort of universe is it that causes a man like Tony Boucher to die of cancer?” I had been wondering the same thing ever since Tony Boucher died. When I met Theodore Surgeon, who wrote MORE THAN HUMAN, this good man said to me right off, “What sort of universe is it that causes a man like Tony Boucher to die of cancer?” I had been wondering the same thing ever since Tony Boucher died. So had Ted Sturgeon, although he didn’t expect me to give an answer. He just wanted to show me what he – Ted Sturgeon – was like. I’ve found I can do that, too; let people know about me by asking that. It shows that I cared a lot about one of the warmest peo

March 4, 1975

Dear Dr. Ornstein:

Recently I met Mr. Henry Korman and Mr. Tony Hiss (Tony had come by to interview me for the New Yorker). I got into a marvelous discussion with Henry about Sufi and I mentioned my admiration, bordering on fanatic enthusiasm, for your pioneer work with bilateral brain hemispheric parity. Hypnagogic thoughts: field one and field two somewhat like Form one and Form two of Hericlitus, which is like Yang and Yin. The gnostics believed in only two parts of universe's time cycle: now (drudgery, which would be roughly Form two) and the good spring to follow (or form one, Yang). UBIK does indeed to resemble Dr. NK's time theory that one knowing his time theory could not escape noticing this when he read UBIK (for example, the scientific explanation of Ubik assigns a positive value, in terms of life-sustaining or giving energy, to a counterclock spin, which is virtually a parody of Dr. NK's concept of lefthandedness being life supportive).
